user.title: cTrader App Credentials
user.description: Register your app at https://openapi.ctrader.com and get Spotware approval first. Make sure your app's redirect URI matches the one below.

data.redirect_uri: Redirect URI (must match the one in your cTrader app)

auth.title: Authorize Your cTrader Account
auth.description: Click **Open cTrader** to log in with your cTID and allow access. You'll be redirected back to Home Assistant automatically.

abort.already_configured: This cTrader account is already configured.
abort.missing_code: No authorization code received. Try again.
abort.token_exchange_failed: Failed to exchange authorization code for tokens. Try again.
abort.invalid_auth: Tokens are invalid. Check your credentials and try again.
